blocks.label: Women's Final — 6 Jun 2026
blocks.title: Andreeva d. Chwalińska 6-3, 6-2
blocks.detail: Mirra Andreeva (RUS) defeated Maja Chwalińska (POL) 6-3, 6-2 to claim her first Grand Slam title. Aged 19, she is the first teenager to win the Roland-Garros women's singles since Iga Swiatek in 2020.

blocks.label: Men's Final — 8 Jun 2026
blocks.title: Zverev d. Cobolli 6-1, 4-6, 6-4, 6-7(5), 6-1
blocks.detail: Alexander Zverev (GER) defeated Flavio Cobolli (ITA) in five sets over 4 hours 16 minutes to win his first Grand Slam title. Cobolli was a first-time Grand Slam finalist.

blocks.label: Round of 16 — notable result
blocks.title: Kostyuk d. Swiatek
blocks.detail: Marta Kostyuk (UKR) defeated top seed Iga Swiatek in the Round of 16 — major upset of the tournament.
